hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command // empty' | awk 'BEGIN{rc=0} { stripped=$0; gsub(/"[^"]*"/, "", stripped); gsub(/\x27[^\x27]*\x27/, "", stripped); n=split(stripped, segs, /(&&|\|\||;)/); for (i=1; i<=n; i++) { seg=segs[i]; sub(/^[[:space:]]+/, "", seg); sub(/^rtk[[:space:]]+/, "", seg); sub(/^sudo[[:space:]]+/, "", seg); if (seg ~ /^(kubectl|helm|flux)([[:space:]]|$)/) { if (seg !~ /(--context|--kube-context)[=[:space:]]*home/) { print "Refusing: kubectl/helm/flux command missing --context home. Add --context home." > "/dev/stderr"; rc=2 } } } } END { exit rc }'

jq -r '.tool_input.file_path // .tool_input.path // empty' | awk 'BEGIN{rc=0} /\.sops\.ya?ml$/ { f=$0; cmd="grep -c \"ENC\\[\" \"" f "\" 2>/dev/null"; cmd | getline n; close(cmd); if (n+0 == 0) { print "SOPS guard: " f " is plaintext after edit. Run: task sops:encrypt-file file=" f > "/dev/stderr"; rc=2 } } END { exit rc }'
